title: alangium polyosmoides subsp. polyosmoides
intro: Alangium polyosmoides subsp. polyosmosoides, also known as the "Gunn's alangium" or "Chinese alangium," is a plant species within the Cornaceae family. It is widely recognized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, offering benefits like reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and enhanced cardiovascular health. Alangium polyosmoides subsp. polyosmosoides is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are administered to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
